scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,TS,ELECTRON -c blue,green,magenta "vite --port 5173" "tsc -w --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on dist/main/main.js http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/main && cp src/preload.cjs dist/main/preload.cjs && mkdir -p dist/py && cp -R py/* dist/py
scripts.setup: npm run setup:py && npm run setup:voice
